metadata.description: Personal dev productivity report for Claude Code — active hours, lines of code, and token usage/estimated cost, entirely local.

plugins.name: dev-stats
plugins.description: Report personal dev productivity: active hours from local Claude Code and Codex CLI session transcripts, lines-of-code contributed across your repos via git log, and token usage with an estimated cost (priced against LiteLLM's public pricing data). Runs entirely locally, no dependencies beyond Python 3 stdlib.
